title: cyclobalanopsis helferiana
intro: Cyclobalanopsis helferiana, also known as the Helfer's oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis helferiana include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
